Freeze outcome head risk scores at seed end for all generated windows; eliminates mid-trajectory covariate shift; AUROC +0.012 AUPRC +0.011 MAE -9.64h; gen metrics unchanged within noise; DEATH +0.037 HYPOGLY/HYPERGLY/KIDNEY +0.025-0.045 RELEASE -0.038 CARDIO still 0.203 (mismatch: 48h horizon vs late-developing events)

Separate phase3_outcome_horizon_hours=168h from outcome_horizon_hours=48h: Phase2 still early-stops at epoch 23 (vl_loss plateaus); backbone still broken (gen_median_steps=4); AUROC unchanged ~0.50. Fix: force Phase2 to train full 100 epochs via phase2_early_stop_patience=80

phase2_early_stop_patience=80 → 98 Phase2 epochs; gen_median_steps still 4; backbone consistently finds degenerate local min (TERMINAL dominant at all positions) regardless of training duration; root cause: no fixed seed at GPT init (api.py:364)

seed=42 confirmed via smoke test (gen_median_steps=22) but full data (40k patients) overrides init → same TERMINAL-dominant local min; gen_median_steps=4 regardless; seed optimization dead end per user; need algorithmic fix
